ham.subject: Your Amazon Order Confirmation - #1234567890
ham.body:
Hi Rahul,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon India! Your order has been successfully placed.

Order Number: 1234567890
Items:
• 1 x HP Envy 15.6" Laptop – ₹47,990
• 1 x Amazon Smart Plug – ₹1,249

Total Amount: ₹49,239 (incl. taxes & shipping)
Estimated Delivery: 2–4 business days

If you have any questions, reply to this email or visit <URL>.

Best Regards,
Amazon Customer Support

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Microsoft 365 Password Expiry Notice
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected that your Microsoft 365 password is about to expire. To ensure uninterrupted access to your corporate email, SharePoint, and Teams, you must update your password within the next 48 hours.

If you fail to reset your password, your account will be automatically suspended and you may lose access to all corporate data.

Please click the link below to reset your password immediately:

<URL>

If you did not request this, please ignore this message.

Regards,
Microsoft 365 Security Team
